name: ArGo Belt-Clip Carry Case
summary: ArGo Belt-Clip Carry Case — a carry case for carrying your kit safely.
description: Effortlessly access your Arizer ArGo, pre-loaded Glass Aroma Tubes, and extra batteries by attaching them to your belt with our convenient Belt-Clip Carry Case. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. Keeps your kit protected and discreet in transit.
